# fly
# 不定时更新
所有免费节点都爬取自网络，请勿用于非法用途  
|  工具  | Android  | Windows  |  
|  ----  | ----   | ----  |  
| v2ray  | [v2rayNG](https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/releases) | [v2rayN](https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN/releases) |  
| Clash  | - | [Clash For Windows](https://github.com/2dust/clashN/releases) | 
  
### 节点更新订阅  v2ray
- `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ts-sf/fly/main/v2`  
- `https://mirror.v2gh.com/https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ts-sf/fly/main/v2`  

#### 部分节点  
``` 
trojan://humanity@104.18.32.47:443?security=tls&type=ws&sni=www.calmlunch.com&path=/assignment#%E6%9C%AA%E7%9F%A52
vmess:
trojan://humanity@www.multiplydose.com:443?security=tls&type=ws&sni=www.multiplydose.com&path=/assignment&host=www.multiplydose.com#%E6%9C%AA%E7%9F%A54
trojan://humanity@172.67.180.92:443?security=tls&type=ws&sni=www.multiplydose.com&path=/assignment&host=www.multiplydose.com#%E6%9C%AA%E7%9F%A55
trojan://86e150eb21c6faee48e81d496d7f61c2@13.230.3.199:2001?sni=www.nintendogames.net#%F0%9F%87%AF%F0%9F%87%B5JP%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%AC
```
